creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to rainer from comment #1)

Several third-party modules can't be built with PCRE2 support, and that's why PCRE1 is still default option.


There're two steps to build the www/nginx-devel with QUIC support:

1. choose a third-party modern TLS library: openssl-quictls or boringssl, build and install;

2. run `make config' and choose HTTPV3 and one of the options HTTPV3_BORING or HTTPV3_QLTS, based on choice in 1.

Since HTTPv3 support is under development, so I'd recommend to provide any feedback directly to the NGINX Development mailing list.

Thank you.
